---
title: "EC2 Cost Estimator (Simulasi Harga)"
---

Hitung estimasi pengeluaran kasarmu sebelum meluncurkan instance di AWS:

```{=html}
<div class="calc-container" style="background: #1e293b; border: 1px solid #334155; border-radius: 12px; padding: 28px; max-width: 520px; margin: 0 auto;">
  <h4 style="margin-top:0; color:#FF9900; font-weight:700;">🧮 EC2 Calculator</h4>
  <p style="color: #94a3b8; font-size: 0.85rem; margin-bottom: 20px;">Simulasi perhitungan biaya tipe instance On-Demand per bulan.</p>

  <div style="margin-bottom: 16px;">
    <label style="display: block; font-size: 0.85rem; color: #cbd5e1; margin-bottom: 6px;">Pilih Tipe Instance:</label>
    <select id="tipeInstance" style="width: 100%; padding: 10px; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid #334155; background: #0f172a; color: white; font-size: 0.9rem;">
      <option value="0.0104">t3.micro ($0.0104 / jam)</option>
      <option value="0.0208">t3.small ($0.0208 / jam)</option>
      <option value="0.0416">t3.medium ($0.0416 / jam)</option>
      <option value="0.0960">m5.large ($0.0960 / jam)</option>
      <option value="0.1700">c5.xlarge ($0.1700 / jam)</option>
      <option value="0.2520">r5.xlarge ($0.2520 / jam)</option>
    </select>
  </div>

  <div style="margin-bottom: 16px;">
    <label style="display: block; font-size: 0.85rem; color: #cbd5e1; margin-bottom: 6px;">Jumlah Hari Aktif (per bulan):</label>
    <input type="number" id="jumlahHari" value="30" min="1" max="31"
      style="width: 100%; padding: 10px; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid #334155; background: #0f172a; color: white; font-size: 0.9rem; box-sizing: border-box;">
  </div>

  <div style="margin-bottom: 20px;">
    <label style="display: block; font-size: 0.85rem; color: #cbd5e1; margin-bottom: 6px;">Jam Aktif per Hari:</label>
    <input type="number" id="jamPerHari" value="24" min="1" max="24"
      style="width: 100%; padding: 10px; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid #334155; background: #0f172a; color: white; font-size: 0.9rem; box-sizing: border-box;">
  </div>

  <button
    onclick="hitungBiayaEC2()"
    style="width: 100%; background: #FF9900; color: #0f172a; border: none; padding: 12px; border-radius: 6px; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1rem; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 0.2s;"
    onmouseover="this.style.opacity='0.85'" onmouseout="this.style.opacity='1'">
    Hitung Total Estimasi
  </button>

  <div id="boxHasil" style="display: none; margin-top: 20px; padding: 20px; background: rgba(255,153,0,0.1); border: 1px dashed #FF9900; border-radius: 8px; text-align: center;">
    <span style="font-size: 0.85rem; color: #cbd5e1; display: block;">Estimasi Biaya Bulanan:</span>
    <span id="textTotal" style="font-size: 1.8rem; font-weight: 700; color: #FF9900; display: block; margin-top: 6px;">$0.00</span>
    <span id="textDetail" style="font-size: 0.8rem; color: #64748b; display: block; margin-top: 4px;"></span>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
function hitungBiayaEC2() {
  var tarif  = parseFloat(document.getElementById('tipeInstance').value);
  var hari   = parseInt(document.getElementById('jumlahHari').value);
  var jam    = parseInt(document.getElementById('jamPerHari').value);

  if (isNaN(hari) || hari < 1 || hari > 31) {
    alert('Masukkan jumlah hari yang valid (1–31)!');
    return;
  }
  if (isNaN(jam) || jam < 1 || jam > 24) {
    alert('Masukkan jam aktif per hari yang valid (1–24)!');
    return;
  }

  var totalJam   = hari * jam;
  var totalBiaya = (tarif * totalJam).toFixed(2);

  var selectedText = document.getElementById('tipeInstance').selectedOptions[0].text;
  var instanceName = selectedText.split(' ')[0];

  document.getElementById('boxHasil').style.display = 'block';
  document.getElementById('textTotal').innerHTML =
    '$' + totalBiaya + ' <span style="font-size:0.9rem; font-weight:400; color:#cbd5e1;">/ bulan</span>';
  document.getElementById('textDetail').innerText =
    instanceName + ' × ' + totalJam + ' jam (' + hari + ' hari × ' + jam + ' jam/hari) × $' + tarif + '/jam';
}
</script>
```
